name: Kraftwerk
bio: Kraftwerk continue to earn through a foundational electronic catalog whose influence, sampling legacy, and streaming rediscovery remain commercially meaningful.
notable_for: Foundational electronic recordings with unusually strong influence-driven afterlife.
career_highlight: Songs like The Model still function as core reference points in electronic and synth-pop catalog listening.
revenue_drivers: Electronic discovery and influence-driven listening sustain catalog replay.
Sampling history and cultural reference value support long-tail relevance.
Specialist fan listening keeps the core catalog active over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Kraftwerk's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Kraftwerk's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
